case_title: DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON VS. TOBO CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $698.69 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-25-2010, FILED BY PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797
